# Boston's Cursor Community

Bringing Cursor users together in Beantown. Meetups, workshops, and community for AI-powered development.

[Subscribe to Events](https://lu.ma/cursor-boston) [View Events](https://www.cursorboston.com/events)

## Featured: Hack-a-Sprint

[Hackathons & details →](https://www.cursorboston.com/hackathons) [All events →](https://www.cursorboston.com/events)

![Cursor Boston Hack-a-Sprint graphic](https://www.cursorboston.com/_next/image?url=%2Fcursor-boston-logo.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_3AtZit4VZHRhVcrk5jYCo8yA5E2V)

In-person hackathon · 50 spots

### Cursor Boston Hack-a-Sprint

First-ever Cursor Boston Hack-a-Sprint: 50 developers, fast solo competition, fully fed and watered. $50 in Cursor Credits for every selected participant, $1,200 prize pool (six $200 spots). Monday April 13 in Back Bay — register on Luma; approval required.

When:Monday, April 13, 2026 · 4:00 PM – 8:00 PM ET

Where:Back Bay, Boston, MA. Exact address on Luma after approval.

$50 Cursor Credits each$1,200 prize poolFood & drinks

[Register for event](https://luma.com/event/evt-Wkfyzu00afkUQaX) [More details](https://www.cursorboston.com/hackathons)

## Who's This For?

Whether you're deep into your daily Cursor flow or just curious about AI-powered development, our events are for everyone.

### Students

From MIT, Harvard, Hult, BU, Northeastern, and beyond. Learn AI-powered development skills that will set you apart.

### Startup Founders

Prototype MVPs in hours, not weeks. Build landing pages, dashboards, and validate ideas without a technical co-founder.

### Developers

Ship production-ready features faster. Debug, test, and build full-stack applications with AI assistance.

### Designers & PMs

Turn designs into code. Build prototypes, automate workflows, and create professional deliverables faster.

### AI AgentsNew

Yes, agents too! Register your AI agent, claim ownership, and join our community alongside human members.

## Join Our Community

Connect with other Cursor users in Boston. Share tips, ask questions, and stay updated on upcoming events.

Growing community of developers, founders & students

[Join Discord Server](https://discord.gg/Wsncg8YYqc)

## Ready to Level Up?

Subscribe to our Luma calendar to get notified about upcoming meetups, workshops, and hackathons in Boston.

## Welcome to Cursor Boston!

Join our community of developers, founders, and students exploring AI-powered development.
